title: Compose UI: primary-runtime selector + per-runtime provider selector

review.summary: Selector value/onChange correct; provider selector reused from S1 config_schema; minor non-blocking stale-value UX nit.

tests.cmd: n/a (no component-test infra; primary_runtime persistence is generic globalConfig serialization, already typechecked)
tests.summary: covered by e2e/walkthrough — UI behavior + persist-to-apm.yml

e2e.summary: 6/6 UI checks pass against the running app (127.0.0.1:7777): S5 primary_runtime selector + Default option; S4 runtimes in tier-grouped grid; S1 claude-code-runtime fitting + provider options. Screenshots in evidence/.

codexReview.summary: r1: 2 findings (gateway provider-drop + explicit-uncomposed-primary) both fixed; r2 APPROVE — two-model agreement. S5 UI clean.

codexPwTest.summary: r1 fail: agent-sdk-runtime missing from library (the user wanted it selectable) -> FIXED (added to library.json). r2 PASS: independent verify of /compose grid+Runtimes, full runtime peer set (Claude Code/Agent SDK/Codex/Gemini) on /compose/runtimes, primary_runtime default, and /api/library ids — no console errors.

designAudit.notes: S5 primary_runtime selector reuses the EXACT existing global-config field pattern (label + .text <select> + .hint) — visually identical to the adjacent permissions_mode field in the same panel (verified in evidence/s5-primary-runtime-selector.png): consistent typography, spacing, hierarchy. The Default option label and provider hint read clearly. S1 fitting uses the standard fitting-card rendering; S4 grid placement is f45c7c61's tier grid (not my UI). No spacing/consistency/hierarchy/polish issues in the surface this feature added.

video.note: Per-beat vision gate PASS (3 content beats: Dev-faculties tier with Runtimes [S4]; Claude Code runtime fitting highlighted [S1]; primary_runtime selector = Default — Claude Code runtime + provider hint [S2/S5]). Navigation surface-tour (not an interaction arc) to avoid a write-race on the SHARED compositions/default; interaction proven by committed e2e (6/6) + unit tests.

notes.files: src/components/compose/FacultyStation.tsx (UNMODIFIED by others — safe): added primary_runtime <select> in OrchestratorGlobalConfig (value globalConfig.primary_runtime, onChange persists via saveComposition) + runtimeOptions prop computed from selections.runtimes + library names.
notes.providerSelector: Per-runtime provider selection ALREADY works via S1's config_schema (provider declared type:select -> ConfigInput renders a dropdown). No new code needed; secret-ref input not required (vault keys are global, entered in the Vault tab).
